positive: A detailed illustration of an astronaut floating in deep space, observing a vibrant, stylized nebula forming intricate geometric patterns of blues, purples, and golds. The astronaut's silhouette should be clean and bold against the cosmic backdrop. The art style is neo-futurism mixed with celestial stained-glass aesthetic, utilizing thick, clean lines and high contrast. Composition is centered, focusing on the juxtaposition of the isolated figure and the overwhelming beauty of space. Use flat, saturated colors with stark black negative space. Ideal for screen printing on t-shirts, vector-art quality.
